return(function(h,N,m,O,E,v,Z,S,M,T,y,Q,A,B,x,q,u,W,t,r,Y,P)P,Q,A,x,W,r,B,q,T,t,M,y,Y,u,S=function(h,a)local N=Y(a)local m=function(m,O,E,v,Z,q)return T(h,{m,O,E;v;Z;q},a,N)end return m end,function(h,a)local N=Y(a)local m=function(m,O,E,v,Z)return T(h,{m;O,E;v,Z},a,N)end return m end,function(h,a)local N=Y(a)local m=function(m,O,E,v)return T(h,{m,O;E,v},a,N)end return m
